title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shyaway Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shyaway Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shyaway Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shyaway Digital Technologies:
Shyaway Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shyaway Digital Technologies!
